scripts.build: npm run build -w @soulforge/shared && npm run build -w @soulforge/core && npm run build -w @soulforge/desktop
scripts.codexpro:setup: codexpro setup --root . --mode agent --write workspace --bash safe --bash-session soulforge --require-bash-session --tool-mode standard
scripts.codexpro:start: codexpro start --root . --mode agent --write workspace --bash safe --bash-session soulforge --require-bash-session --tool-mode standard
